description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a vibrant and artistic label design. The front features a large, stylized illustration of a coffee cup with swirling steam, surrounded by playful, hand-drawn typography and decorative elements in blue, orange, and cream tones. The upper section of the can is bordered by a deep blue band containing white text and logos, while the back displays detailed product information, a barcode, and additional branding. The can's surface appears smooth and metallic, with a standard pull tab closure on top. The overall appearance is modern and eye-catching, with a focus on bold graphics and clear labeling. The can is typical of craft beer packaging, designed to stand out on shelves and in urban environments.
description: A tall aluminum can with a colorful, artistic label featuring a coffee cup illustration, bold typography, and a blue band with white text. The can is sleek, modern, and visually striking.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the main label with a large coffee cup illustration, swirling steam, and bold, decorative typography in blue and orange.
description_view_1: This angled view reveals the transition from the main graphic to the side panel, showing part of the blue band, additional orange text, and the start of the product information section.
description_view_2: The back view displays the product information, including a logo, descriptive text, and a barcode, with minimal graphic elements compared to the front.
description_view_3: This side view highlights the seam of the label, the blue band with website and location text, and a partial view of the main graphic and barcode.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a hand-drawn, whimsical illustration of a coffee cup with swirling steam, surrounded by bold, playful typography and decorative flourishes in blue, orange, and cream. The design is modern and artistic, with a prominent blue band at the top and a mix of script and block lettering.
